name: Jim's Granola
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Pop the popcorn and spread it out on a baking sheet.
3. In a large bowl, combine all dry ingredients.
4. In a separate bowl, mix together honey, oil, and flavoring of choice.
5. Pour the honey mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
6. Spread the mixture evenly in the preheated oven.
7. Bake for 45 minutes, stirring every 15 minutes to ensure even cooking.
8. Remove from oven and stir in any optional fruits such as raisins, chopped dates, dried apricots, dried pineapple, or dried papaya.
9. Allow granola to cool completely before serving or storing.
